items.title: Apple Targets 2026 Launch For AI Smart Glasses, Camera-Equipped AirPods, With Foxconn, TSMC Set To Play Key Roles: Report
items.description: Apple is reportedly targeting a 2026 launch for AI-powered smart glasses and camera-equipped AirPods.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Boosts Apple (AAPL) Target, Sees Upside From Pricing Power and AI
items.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) is one of the AI Stocks on the Market’s Radar. On December 17, Morgan Stanley raised its price target on the stock to $315.00 from $305.00 while maintaining an Overweight rating. According to the firm, the new $315 price target reflects an “unchanged 32x multiple on our new FY27 EPS of $9.83 […]

items.title: If You'd Invested $1,000 in Apple 10 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
items.description: Apple's market cap ballooned over the past decade, as dominant companies have become even larger.

items.title: Riding the AI wave? You need a 'strong stomach': Dan Ives' strategy
items.description: In the AI trade, you "can't just bet on one company," Wedbush Securities managing director and global head of technology research, Dan Ives, tells Yahoo Finance, highlighting the importance of diversification for AI investors. Watch the video above to hear more about Ives' AI thesis and the 30 stocks in the Dan IVES Wedbush AI Revolution ETF (IVES). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

items.title: Consumer Tech News (Dec 15-19): Meta Accelerates AI Wearables Push, Trump Unveils U.S. Air Taxi Strategy, US Halts Technology Agreement With UK & More
items.description: White House AI czar David Sacks says AI is driving U.S. hiring and wage growth, challenging claims it threatens American jobs. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy reveals Trump administration plan to launch U.S. air taxi operations and expand urban mobility.
